hero.tagline: Building beauty brand growth through product launches, e-commerce execution, livestream commerce, and multi-channel media plans.

about.bioParagraph1: I'm a results-driven Marketing Executive with 3+ years of experience across brand marketing, e-commerce, and beauty industry project execution. My work spans product launch events, end-to-end merchandise production, multi-channel media plans, livestream commerce, and online visibility for beauty brands.
about.bioParagraph2: At L'Oréal Vietnam, I support Kérastase, L'Oréal Professionnel, and Matrix projects across TikTok, Shopee, CRM/CEM, e-commerce assets, brand collaborations, and launch events. I am a second-highest-ranking Business Administration graduate from UEF with a 3.7/4.0 GPA, a Top 1 Merit Scholarship, and four years of 50% scholarship support.

educationHistory.institutionName: University of Economics and Finance Ho Chi Minh City

projects.projectDescription: Scaled TikTok and Shopee video quantity by 150% within 2 months, enhancing engagement and increasing GMV by 3% while managing end-to-end merchandise production and e-commerce listings.
Developed creative concepts and executed the Serioxyl “Độ tóc tốc độ” launch plus Kérastase Gloss Absolu and Elixir Ultime events with consistent brand guideline execution.
Coordinated ~40 monthly visual assets across SIS, PDP, CPAS, and banners; planned CEM/CRM and Shopee video visibility; and supported Instax, Sony, and Logitech collaborations.
Hosted daily livestream sessions showcasing Estée Lauder products and aligned content with seasonal campaigns, holiday promotions, and product launches while achieving 100–130% monthly KPIs.
Grew TikTok to 9K+ followers, managed KOL/KOC partnerships and affiliate campaigns at 120% KPI, built an 80–100 client pipeline, and managed Hasaki, Watsons, and Guardian distribution.

responsibilities: Scaled TikTok and Shopee video quantity by 150% within 2 months, enhancing engagement and increasing GMV by 3%
Managed end-to-end merchandise production with vendors and e-commerce platform listings, maintaining 100% catalog integrity and visual consistency
Developed creative concepts and executed the Serioxyl “Độ tóc tốc độ” launch plus Kérastase Gloss Absolu and Elixir Ultime events

Spearheaded briefing and coordination of ~40 monthly visual assets (SIS, PDP, CPAS, banners) with design teams, ensuring 100% brand guideline compliance
Planned, executed, and optimized CEM/CRM, Shopee video plans, and e-commerce visibilities, driving 3–5% GMV growth per month
Coordinated high-profile brand collaborations with Instax, Sony, and Logitech for top spenders
Supported content planning and creative production for TikTok videos

Collaborated with the Ecommerce and Marketing team to align livestream content with seasonal campaigns, holiday promotions, and new product launches
Co-created promotional content videos and led engaging TikTok livestreams, achieving top-tier sales KPIs (125% in Nov, 120% in Dec)
Content & Brand Marketing: grew TikTok to 9K+ followers; managed KOL/KOC partnerships and affiliate campaigns, achieving 120% KPI
B2B Sales & Operations: developed an 80–100 client pipeline; negotiated contracts and managed distribution for Hasaki, Watsons, and Guardian
Livestreaming: hosted monthly livestreams on TikTok and Shopee, delivering 100%+ sales targets

skillList.skillDescription: Leading cross-functional coordination across marketing, design, vendors, e-commerce teams, and external partners.
Optimizing workflows, campaign execution, launch planning, and online visibility under fast-paced project demands.
Briefing design teams, aligning stakeholders, coordinating vendors, and keeping brand guidelines clear across deliverables.
Moving across beauty retail, e-commerce livestreaming, hospitality operations, launch events, and campaign execution.
Developing creative concepts for launch events, TikTok content, Shopee videos, and beauty brand storytelling.
Managing merchandise production, asset timelines, event execution, e-commerce listings, and multi-channel media plans.
Using Microsoft Excel, Google Sheets, and Canva to organize execution details, campaign assets, and reporting workflows.

activityAccomplishments: Supported organizers in engaging students across Ho Chi Minh City for the 2022 conference
Contributed to attracting participants, helping attendance increase to 1,000+ participants
